ginsengfoodV2HardLocks: G1 is the initial operational baseline for go-live schema, seed, production-order snapshot, material issue, trace, recall, and validation flows.
Future accepted formula versions such as G2/G3 must be approved, activated, snapshotted immutably, audited, and retired without rewriting production history.
G0 is research/baseline context only and must not be active in operational seed, production order, material issue, costing, trace, recall, or handoff.
Operational recipe display and material issue use SPECIAL_SKU_COMPONENT, NUTRITION_BASE, BROTH_EXTRACT, and SEASONING_FLAVOR.
Ingredient master must include ING_MI_CHINH and HRB_SAM_SAVIGIN.
Current code routes must be mapped before API route changes; do not create parallel route families from documents.
